title: pyrus eugenii-kelleri
intro: Pyrus eugenii-kelleri, also known as the Korean mountain apple, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rosaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Pyrus eugenii-kelleri include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. The plant's berries can be used to make herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and jams, which are believed to provide additional health benefits due to their high antioxidant content.
